sn38.10:1.1: "Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘craving, craving.’ What now is craving?"
sn38.10:1.2: "There are, friend, these three kinds of craving: craving for sensual pleasures, craving for existence, craving for extermination. These are the three kinds of craving."
sn38.10:1.3: "But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the abandonment of this craving?"
sn38.10:2.2: "There is a path, friend, there is a way … this Noble Eightfold Path … ."
